message:
feat(cli): comprehensive CLI rewrite with full command suite

Major rewrite of the fm-cli crate to provide a production-ready
command-line interface for FrankenMermaid:

New Command Structure:
- render: Convert Mermaid diagrams to SVG, PNG, or terminal output
  with theme support and configurable output destinations
- parse: Output diagram IR as JSON for tooling and debugging
  integration
- detect: Show detected diagram type with confidence scoring
- validate: Check input for syntax errors and report diagnostics
  with structured error output
- watch: Re-render on file change (behind feature flag)
- serve: Start local HTTP server with live-reload playground
  (behind feature flag)

CLI Improvements:
- Global -v/-vv/-vvv verbose flags with tracing integration
- Global -q quiet mode for script-friendly output
- Stdin support with "-" input convention
- Structured JSON output option for all commands
- Comprehensive help text and examples
- Exit codes following Unix conventions

Rendering Enhancements:
- Multiple output formats (SVG, PNG, terminal ASCII)
- Theme selection (default, dark, forest, neutral)
- Width/height constraints for PNG output
- Background color configuration

Canvas Renderer:
- Minor adjustments in fm-render-canvas for consistency

Dependencies:
- Updated Cargo.lock with new dependencies for CLI features

This transforms fm-cli from a skeleton into a fully functional
diagram rendering tool suitable for CI/CD pipelines and
interactive use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
